title: Verify npm and CDN publication
description: Verified that @archmap/core@0.1.0 was published, GitHub Pages is live, and jsDelivr/unpkg CDN URLs resolve after purging early 404 cache entries.
decision_notes: The user's second npm publish attempt returned E403 because version 0.1.0 had already been published.
npm view briefly returned E404 while npm access/dist-tag already showed @archmap/core public/latest: 0.1.0; npm pack @archmap/core@0.1.0 confirmed the published tarball was downloadable.
jsDelivr had cached the earlier 404 checks; purging the two bundle URLs made both resolve with HTTP 200.
